title: selaginella bemarahensis
intro: Selaginella bemarahensis, also known as Bemarah spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Madagascar for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella bemarahensis are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and lower blood sugar levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
